title: #LINK-REFS: XHTML-DependencyVis.xhtml — 3 broken CSS relative hrefs

Broken refs: (1) href="../../styles/pwshgui-base.css" -> resolves to C:\styles\pwshgui-base.css (missing), (2) href="../../styles/pwshgui-responsive.css" -> resolves to C:\styles\pwshgui-responsive.css (missing), (3) href="../../styles/layout-mastertight-wleftmenu.css" -> resolves to C:\styles\layout-mastertight-wleftmenu.css (missing). Fix: change all three to styles/pwshgui-base.css, styles/pwshgui-responsive.css, styles/layout-mastertight-wleftmenu.css (relative to workspace root).
